tray.tooltip.description: Hover tooltip on the system-tray / menu-bar icon. Brand name — do not translate.

tray.status.disconnected.description: Connection status surfaced through the tray icon: the client is not connected to the network.

tray.status.daemonUnavailable.description: Tray status: the background NetBird service (daemon) is not running.

tray.status.error.description: Tray status: the client is in an error state.

tray.status.connected.description: Tray status: connected to the NetBird network.

tray.status.connecting.description: Tray status: a connection is being established.

tray.status.needsLogin.description: Tray status: the user must sign in before connecting.

tray.status.loginFailed.description: Tray status: the last sign-in attempt failed.

tray.status.sessionExpired.description: Tray status: the authenticated session expired; the user must sign in again.

tray.session.expiresIn.description: Tray row showing time left before the session expires. {remaining} is a human-readable duration such as '5 minutes', built from the tray.session.unit.* strings. Keep {remaining} unchanged.

tray.session.unit.lessThanMinute.description: Duration fragment substituted into {remaining} (see tray.session.expiresIn). Used when under one minute remains.

tray.session.unit.minute.description: Duration fragment for exactly one minute, substituted into {remaining}.

tray.session.unit.minutes.description: Duration fragment for several minutes, substituted into {remaining}. {count} is the number of minutes; keep {count}.

tray.session.unit.hour.description: Duration fragment for exactly one hour, substituted into {remaining}.

tray.session.unit.hours.description: Duration fragment for several hours. {count} is the number of hours; keep {count}.

tray.session.unit.day.description: Duration fragment for exactly one day, substituted into {remaining}.

tray.session.unit.days.description: Duration fragment for several days. {count} is the number of days; keep {count}.

tray.menu.open.description: Tray menu item that opens the main NetBird window. Keep short.

tray.menu.connect.description: Tray menu item that connects to the network. Keep short.

tray.menu.disconnect.description: Tray menu item that disconnects from the network. Keep short.

tray.menu.exitNode.description: Tray submenu title for choosing an exit node (route all traffic through another peer).

tray.menu.networks.description: Tray submenu title listing network resources the user can reach. Labelled 'Resources' in the UI even though the key says networks.

tray.menu.profiles.description: Tray submenu title listing connection profiles.

tray.menu.manageProfiles.description: Tray menu item that opens Settings → Profiles.

tray.menu.settings.description: Tray menu item that opens the Settings window. The trailing '...' signals that a window opens; keep it.

tray.menu.debugBundle.description: Tray menu item that generates a diagnostic log bundle for support.

tray.menu.about.description: Tray submenu title for help and support links.

tray.menu.github.description: Tray menu link to the GitHub repository. Brand name — do not translate.

tray.menu.documentation.description: Tray menu link to the online documentation.

tray.menu.troubleshoot.description: Tray menu link to troubleshooting help.

tray.menu.downloadLatest.description: Tray menu item to download the latest available version.

tray.menu.installVersion.description: Tray menu item to install a specific update. {version} is a version number like 0.30.1; keep {version}.

tray.menu.guiVersion.description: Tray menu row showing the installed UI version. 'GUI' = the graphical app. {version} is a version number; keep it.

tray.menu.daemonVersion.description: Tray menu row showing the background-service version. 'Daemon' = the background NetBird service. {version} is a version number; keep it.

tray.menu.versionUnknown.description: Placeholder shown in version rows when the version can't be determined. It is an em dash — leave as-is.

tray.menu.quit.description: Tray menu item that fully exits the app and removes the tray icon. Keep short.

notify.daemonOutdated.title.description: Title of the OS desktop notification shown when the running daemon is too old for this UI.

notify.daemonOutdated.body.message: יש לעדכן את שירות NetBird כדי להשתמש ביישום הזה.
notify.daemonOutdated.body.description: Body of the desktop notification telling the user to upgrade the daemon.

notify.update.title.description: Title of the OS desktop notification shown when an app update is available.

notify.update.body.description: Body of the update-available desktop notification. {version} is the new version number; keep it.

notify.update.enforcedSuffix.message: הנהלת המערכת דורשת ממך לעדכן לגרסה הזאת.
notify.update.enforcedSuffix.description: Sentence appended to the update notification body when the admin has made the update mandatory. Note the leading space — keep it.

notify.error.title.description: Title of a generic error desktop notification.

notify.error.connect.description: Error notification body shown when connecting failed.

notify.error.disconnect.description: Error notification body shown when disconnecting failed.

notify.error.switchProfile.description: Error notification shown when switching profiles failed. {profile} is the target profile name; keep it.

notify.error.exitNode.description: Error notification shown when updating the exit node failed. {name} is the exit node name; keep it.

notify.sessionExpired.title.description: Title of the desktop notification shown when the session has expired.

notify.sessionExpired.body.message: תוקף הפעלת ה־NetBird שלך פג. נא להיכנס למערכת שוב.
notify.sessionExpired.body.description: Body of the session-expired desktop notification.

notify.sessionWarning.title.description: Title of the desktop notification warning that the session will expire soon.

notify.sessionWarning.body.message: הפעלת ה־NetBird שלך תפוג בעוד {remaining}. לחיצה על להאריך כעת תחדש אותה.
notify.sessionWarning.body.description: Body of the session-expiry warning notification. {remaining} is a human-readable duration (see tray.session.unit.*); keep it. 'Extend now' refers to the action button notify.sessionWarning.extend.

notify.sessionWarning.bodyGeneric.message: תוקף הפעלת ה־NetBird שלך עומד לפוג. לחיצה על להאריך כעת תחדש אותו.
notify.sessionWarning.bodyGeneric.description: Generic session-expiry warning body used when the exact remaining time isn't known.

notify.sessionWarning.extend.description: Action button on the session-expiry notification that renews the session. Keep short.

notify.sessionWarning.dismiss.description: Action button on the session-expiry notification that dismisses it. Keep short.

notify.sessionWarning.failed.description: Notification shown when renewing the session failed.

notify.sessionWarning.successTitle.description: Title of the notification confirming the session was renewed.

notify.sessionWarning.successBody.description: Body of the notification confirming the session was renewed.

notify.sessionDeadlineRejected.title.description: Title of the notification shown when the server sent an invalid session deadline.

notify.sessionDeadlineRejected.body.message: השרת שלח מועד סיום שגוי להפעלה. נא להיכנס שוב למערכת.
notify.sessionDeadlineRejected.body.description: Body explaining the server sent an invalid session deadline and the user must sign in again.

notify.mdm.policyApplied.title.description: Title of the desktop notification shown when an MDM (IT-managed) policy changed the daemon configuration at runtime.

notify.mdm.policyApplied.body.message: הגדרות ה־NetBird שלך עודכנו על ידי מדיניות צוות המחשוב שלך.
notify.mdm.policyApplied.body.description: Body of the MDM policy-applied notification, telling the user their settings were changed by their organization's device-management policy.

common.cancel.description: Generic Cancel button label, reused across dialogs. Keep short.

common.save.description: Generic Save button label. Keep short.

common.saveChanges.description: Button label to save edited settings. Keep short.

common.saving.description: Button label / status shown while a save is in progress. Ends with an ellipsis.

common.close.description: Generic Close button label. Keep short.

common.copy.description: Generic Copy button label (copy to clipboard). Keep short.

common.togglePasswordVisibility.description: Accessibility label for the show/hide button inside a password field.

common.increase.description: Accessibility label for the increment (+) button on a numeric stepper input.

common.decrease.description: Accessibility label for the decrement (−) button on a numeric stepper input.

common.delete.description: Generic Delete button label. Keep short.

common.create.description: Generic Create button label. Keep short.

common.add.description: Generic Add button label. Keep short.

common.remove.description: Generic Remove button label. Keep short.

common.refresh.description: Generic Refresh button label. Keep short.

common.loading.description: Generic loading indicator text. Ends with an ellipsis.

common.netbird.description: The product name. Brand — do not translate.

common.noResults.title.description: Title of the empty state shown when a search or filter returns nothing.

common.noResults.description.message: לא הצלחנו למצוא אף תוצאות. נא לנסות ביטוי חיפוש אחר או לשנות את המסננים שלך.
common.noResults.description.description: Body of the no-results empty state, suggesting a different search term or filters.

notConnected.title.description: Title of the placeholder shown on data screens while disconnected.

notConnected.description.message: יש להתחבר ל־NetBird תחילה כדי לצפות בפרטי פרטים על העמיתים, משאבי הרשת ונקודות היציאה שלך.
notConnected.description.description: Body explaining the user must connect to NetBird first to see peer, resource, and exit-node details.

connect.status.disconnected.description: Label on the main-window connection toggle: not connected.

connect.status.connecting.description: Connection toggle label while connecting. Ends with an ellipsis.

connect.status.disconnecting.description: Connection toggle label while disconnecting. Ends with an ellipsis.

connect.status.daemonUnavailable.description: Connection toggle label when the background service is unavailable. 'Daemon' = background service.

connect.status.loginRequired.description: Connection toggle label when sign-in is required before connecting.

connect.error.loginTitle.description: Error-dialog title shown when sign-in fails. The action-named '… Failed' style is intentional — keep it.

connect.error.connectTitle.description: Error-dialog title shown when connecting fails.

connect.error.disconnectTitle.description: Error-dialog title shown when disconnecting fails.

nav.peers.title.description: Navigation label for the Peers section (other devices in the network).

nav.peers.description.description: Sub-label under Peers showing how many are connected. {connected} and {total} are numbers; keep both.

nav.resources.title.description: Navigation label for the Resources section (routed networks).

nav.resources.description.description: Sub-label under Resources showing how many are active. {active} and {total} are numbers; keep both.

nav.exitNode.title.description: Navigation label for the Exit Nodes section.

nav.exitNode.none.description: Sub-label under Exit Nodes when no exit node is in use.

nav.exitNode.using.description: Sub-label under Exit Nodes when one is active. {name} is the exit node's name; keep it.

header.openSettings.description: Accessibility label / tooltip for the gear icon that opens Settings.

header.togglePanel.description: Accessibility label / tooltip for the button that shows or hides the side panel.

profile.selector.loading.description: Shown in the profile picker while profiles load. Ends with an ellipsis.

profile.selector.noProfile.description: Shown in the profile picker when no profile is selected.

profile.selector.searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the profile picker's search field.

profile.selector.emptyTitle.description: Title shown in the profile picker when a search matches no profiles.

profile.selector.emptyDescription.message: כדאי לנסות ביטוי אחר לחיפוש או ליצור פרופיל חדש.
profile.selector.emptyDescription.description: Body shown when no profiles match the search, suggesting a different term or creating one.

profile.selector.newProfile.description: Button in the profile picker to create a new profile. Keep short.

profile.selector.moreOptions.description: Accessibility label for the per-profile kebab (⋯) menu.

profile.selector.deregister.description: Per-profile menu action: deregister (sign out of the profile but keep it).

profile.selector.delete.description: Per-profile menu action: delete the profile.

profile.selector.switchTo.description: Tooltip / label for the action that switches to a profile.

profile.selector.edit.description: Per-profile menu action: open the edit dialog to rename or change the management server.

profile.edit.title.description: Title of the dialog for editing an existing profile.

profile.edit.submit.description: Submit button on the edit-profile dialog. Keep short.

profile.dialog.title.description: Title of the dialog for naming a new profile.

profile.dialog.nameLabel.description: Field label for the profile name.

profile.dialog.description.message: הגדרת שם שניתן לזהות בקלות לפרופיל שלך.
profile.dialog.description.description: Helper text under the profile-name field.

profile.dialog.placeholder.description: Example placeholder shown in the profile-name field. 'Work' is a sample value; translate it to a natural example.

profile.dialog.submit.description: Submit button on the add-profile dialog. Keep short.

profile.dialog.required.message: נא למלא שם לפרופיל, למשל: עבודה, בית
profile.dialog.required.description: Validation message shown when the profile name is empty. The examples (work, home) may be localized.

profile.dialog.managementHelp.message: אפשר להשתמש בענן של NetBird או בשרת משלך.
profile.dialog.managementHelp.description: Helper text noting the profile can use NetBird Cloud or a self-hosted server.

profile.dialog.urlUnreachable.message: לא ניתן להגיע לשרת. נא לבדוק שהכתובת נכונה או להוסיף את הפרופיל בכל זאת אם ברור לך שהיא נכונה.
profile.dialog.urlUnreachable.description: Soft warning when the entered server URL couldn't be reached; the user may add the profile anyway.

header.menu.settings.description: 'More' menu item in the header that opens Settings. The trailing '...' signals a window opens.

header.menu.defaultView.description: 'More' menu item that switches the main window to the compact default view.

header.menu.advancedView.description: 'More' menu item that switches the main window to the wider advanced view.

header.menu.updateAvailable.description: 'More' menu item / badge shown when an update is available.

header.menu.open.description: Accessibility label for the header's more (⋮) button that opens the menu.

header.profile.switch.description: Accessibility label for the header's profile selector button.

connect.toggle.label.description: Accessibility label for the large connect/disconnect toggle on the main page.

connect.localIp.label.description: Accessibility label for the local IP selector that toggles between IPv4 and IPv6 on the main page.

common.search.description: Accessibility label for a generic search input.

common.filter.description: Accessibility label for a generic filter control.

exitNodes.dropdown.trigger.description: Accessibility label for the exit-node picker button at the bottom of the main page.

peers.row.label.description: Accessibility label for a peer row in the list. {name} is the peer name and {status} is the connection status; keep both placeholders.

peers.dialog.title.description: Accessibility title (announced to screen readers) for the peer details dialog/panel.

networks.row.toggle.description: Accessibility label for the row-wide toggle on a network/resource. {name} is the resource id; keep the placeholder.

networks.bulk.label.message: להחליף את המצב של כל המשאבים הגלויים
networks.bulk.label.description: Accessibility label for the bulk enable/disable button at the bottom of the resources list.

profile.switch.title.description: Confirmation-dialog title for switching profiles. {name} is the target profile name, shown in quotes; keep {name} and the surrounding quotes.

profile.switch.message.message:
להחליף פרופילים?
הפרופיל הנוכחי שלך יתנתק.
profile.switch.message.description: Confirmation body for switching profiles. Contains a line break (\n) — keep it.

profile.switch.confirm.description: Confirm button on the switch-profile dialog. Keep short.

profile.deregister.title.description: Confirmation-dialog title for deregistering a profile. {name} is the profile name; keep it and the quotes.

profile.deregister.message.message:
לבטל את רישום הפרופיל הזה?
צריך להיכנס שוב כדי להשתמש בו.
profile.deregister.message.description: Confirmation body for deregistering; warns the user must sign in again. Contains a line break (\n) — keep it.

profile.deregister.confirm.description: Confirm button on the deregister dialog. Keep short.

profile.delete.title.description: Confirmation-dialog title for deleting a profile. {name} is the profile name; keep it and the quotes.

profile.delete.message.message:
למחוק את הפרופיל הזה?
זאת פעולה בלתי הפיכה.
profile.delete.message.description: Confirmation body for deleting; warns the action can't be undone. Contains a line break (\n) — keep it.

profile.delete.disabledActive.message: לא ניתן למחוק פרופילים פעילים. יש להחליף לפרופיל אחר בטרם מחיקת הפרופיל הזה.
profile.delete.disabledActive.description: Tooltip explaining the active profile can't be deleted until the user switches away.

profile.delete.disabledDefault.message: לא ניתן למחוק את פרופיל ברירת המחדל.
profile.delete.disabledDefault.description: Tooltip explaining the default profile can't be deleted.

profile.error.switchTitle.description: Error-dialog title when switching profiles fails.

profile.error.deregisterTitle.description: Error-dialog title when deregistering a profile fails.

profile.error.deleteTitle.description: Error-dialog title when deleting a profile fails.

profile.error.createTitle.description: Error-dialog title when creating a profile fails.

profile.error.editTitle.description: Error-dialog title when editing a profile (rename or management URL change) fails.

profile.error.loadTitle.description: Error-dialog title when loading profiles fails.

profile.dropdown.activeProfile.description: Section heading in the header profile dropdown for the current profile.

profile.dropdown.switchProfile.description: Section heading / action in the profile dropdown to switch profiles.

profile.dropdown.noEmail.description: Label shown for a profile that has no associated email address.

profile.dropdown.addProfile.description: Profile dropdown action to add a profile.

profile.dropdown.manageProfiles.description: Profile dropdown action that opens Settings → Profiles.

profile.dropdown.settings.description: Profile dropdown action that opens Settings.

settings.profiles.section.profiles.description: Section heading on the Profiles settings tab.

settings.profiles.intro.message: להשאיר את זהויות ה־NetBird הנפרדות זו לצד זו, למשל חשבונות עבודה ופרטי או שרתי ניהול שונים. אפשר להוסיף, לבטל רישום או למחוק פרופילים להלן.
settings.profiles.intro.description: Intro paragraph on the Profiles settings tab explaining what profiles are for.

settings.profiles.addProfile.description: Button on the Profiles settings tab to add a profile.

settings.profiles.active.description: Badge marking the currently active profile in the profiles table.

settings.profiles.emptyTitle.description: Title of the empty state when there are no profiles.

settings.profiles.emptyDescription.message: יש ליצור פרופיל כדי להתחבר לשרת ניהול של NetBird.
settings.profiles.emptyDescription.description: Body of the no-profiles empty state.

settings.error.loadTitle.description: Error-dialog title when loading settings fails.

settings.error.saveTitle.description: Error-dialog title when saving settings fails.

settings.error.debugBundleTitle.description: Error-dialog title when creating the debug bundle fails.

settings.nav.label.description: Accessibility label for the Settings page's side navigation (list of section tabs).

settings.tabs.general.description: Settings tab label: General. Keep short.

settings.tabs.network.description: Settings tab label: Network. Keep short.

settings.tabs.security.description: Settings tab label: Security. Keep short.

settings.tabs.profiles.description: Settings tab label: Profiles. Keep short.

settings.tabs.ssh.description: Settings tab label: SSH. Acronym — keep as-is.

settings.tabs.advanced.description: Settings tab label: Advanced. Keep short.

settings.tabs.troubleshooting.description: Settings tab label: Troubleshoot. Keep short.

settings.tabs.about.description: Settings tab label: About. Keep short.

settings.tabs.updateAvailable.description: Settings tab label / badge shown when an update is available.

settings.general.section.general.description: Section heading on the General settings tab.

settings.general.section.connection.description: Section heading for connection-related options on the General tab.

settings.general.connectOnStartup.label.description: Toggle label: connect automatically when the service starts.

settings.general.connectOnStartup.help.description: Helper text for the connect-on-startup toggle.

settings.general.notifications.help.message: להציג התראות שולחן עבודה על עדכונים חדשים ואירועי חיבור.
settings.general.notifications.help.description: Helper text for the desktop-notifications toggle.

settings.general.autostart.label.message: להפעיל את ממשק המשתמש של NetBird עם הכניסה למערכת
settings.general.autostart.label.description: Toggle label: launch the NetBird UI at login.

settings.general.autostart.help.message: להפעיל את הממשק של NetBird אוטומטית עם הכניסה. הפעולה הזאת משפיעה על הממשק הגרפי בלבד, לא על שירות הרקע.
settings.general.autostart.help.description: Helper text clarifying autostart affects only the UI, not the background service.

settings.general.autostart.errorTitle.description: Error-dialog title when changing the autostart setting fails.

settings.general.language.help.description: Helper text for the language picker.

settings.general.language.search.description: Placeholder in the language picker's search field.

settings.general.language.empty.description: Shown when no languages match the search.

settings.general.management.help.message: אפשר להתחבר לענן של NetBird או לשרת ניהול באירוח שלך. שינויים יחברו את הלקוח מחדש.
settings.general.management.help.description: Helper text explaining Cloud vs self-hosted management server; warns that changes reconnect the client.

settings.general.management.cloud.description: Option label for using NetBird Cloud as the management server.

settings.general.management.selfHosted.description: Option label for using a self-hosted management server. 'Self-hosted' is a common technical term.

settings.general.management.urlPlacehold.description: Example URL placeholder for the self-hosted server field. It is a sample URL — do not translate the URL itself.

settings.general.management.urlError.message: נא למלא כתובת תקפה, למשל, https://netbird.selfhosted.com:443
settings.general.management.urlError.description: Validation message for an invalid management-server URL. The example URL stays as-is.

settings.general.management.urlUnreachab.message: לא ניתן להגיע לשרת הזה. נא לבדוק את הכתובת או לשמור בכל זאת אם ברור לך שהיא נכונה.
settings.general.management.urlUnreachab.description: Soft warning when the management URL couldn't be reached; the user may save anyway.

settings.general.management.switchCloudT.description: Confirmation-dialog title for switching to NetBird Cloud.

settings.general.management.switchCloudM.message:
מנתק אותך מהשרת שלך באירוח עצמי.
יתכן שיהיה עליך להיכנס למערכת שוב.
settings.general.management.switchCloudM.description: Confirmation body warning the self-hosted server will be disconnected. Contains a line break (\n) — keep it.

settings.general.management.switchCloudC.description: Confirm button for switching to Cloud. Keep short.

settings.network.section.connectivity.description: Section heading for connectivity options on the Network tab.

settings.network.section.routingDns.description: Section heading for routing and DNS options. 'DNS' is an acronym — keep it.

settings.network.monitor.label.description: Toggle label: reconnect automatically on network change.

settings.network.monitor.help.message: מעקב אחר הרשת כדי להתחבר מחדש עקב שינויים כגון מעבר רשת אלחוטית, שינויים בחיבור הקווי או התעוררות משינה.
settings.network.monitor.help.description: Helper text for the network-change reconnect toggle.

settings.network.dns.label.description: Toggle label: enable DNS. 'DNS' — keep acronym.

settings.network.dns.help.message: החלת הגדרות DNS בניהול NetBird לפותר שמות המארחים.
settings.network.dns.help.description: Helper text for the enable-DNS toggle.

settings.network.clientRoutes.help.message: קבלת ניתובים מעמיתים אחרים כדי להגיע לרשתות שלהם.
settings.network.clientRoutes.help.description: Helper text for client routes (accept routes from other peers).

settings.network.serverRoutes.help.message: לפרסם את הניתובים המקומיים של המארח הזה לעמיתים אחרים.
settings.network.serverRoutes.help.description: Helper text for server routes (advertise this host's local routes to other peers).

settings.network.ipv6.label.description: Toggle label: enable IPv6. 'IPv6' — keep as-is.

settings.network.ipv6.help.message: להשתמש בחלוקת כתובות IPv6 לרשת שכבת העל של NetBird.
settings.network.ipv6.help.description: Helper text for the IPv6 toggle.

settings.security.blockInbound.help.message: לדחות חיבורים שלא התבקשו מעמיתים למכשיר הזה ולרשתות כלשהן שהוא מנתב אליהן. אין השפעה על התקשורת היוצאת.
settings.security.blockInbound.help.description: Helper text for blocking inbound traffic.

settings.security.blockLan.label.description: Toggle label: block LAN access. 'LAN' — keep acronym.

settings.security.blockLan.help.message: למנוע מעמיתים להגיע לרשת המקומית שלך או המכשירים שבה כאשר המכשיר הזה מנתב את התעבורה שלהם.
settings.security.blockLan.help.description: Helper text for blocking LAN access.

settings.security.rosenpass.help.message: הוספת החלפת מפתחות עמידה לפיענוח צפנים קוונטי דרך Rosenpass על גבי WireGuard®.
settings.security.rosenpass.help.description: Helper text: adds a post-quantum key exchange via Rosenpass on top of WireGuard®. 'Rosenpass' and 'WireGuard®' are product names — do not translate; keep the ® symbol.

settings.security.rosenpassPermissive.la.description: Toggle label: enable permissive mode (for quantum-resistance).

settings.security.rosenpassPermissive.he.message: לאפשר חיבורים לעמיתים ללא תמיכה בעמידות לפיענוח צפנים קוונטי.
settings.security.rosenpassPermissive.he.description: Helper text for permissive mode (allow peers without quantum-resistance support).

settings.ssh.server.label.description: Toggle label: enable the SSH server.

settings.ssh.server.help.message: להריץ את שרת ה־SSH של NetBird על המארח הזה כדי שעמיתים אחרים יוכלו להתחבר אליו.
settings.ssh.server.help.description: Helper text for the SSH server toggle.

settings.ssh.root.label.description: Toggle label: allow root login over SSH. 'root' is the Unix superuser account — keep as-is.

settings.ssh.root.help.message: לאפשר לעמיתים להיכנס בתור משתמש הניהול. אפשר להשבית כדי לדרוש שזה יהיה חשבון ללא הרשאות מופלגות.
settings.ssh.root.help.description: Helper text for allowing root login.

settings.ssh.sftp.label.description: Toggle label: allow SFTP. 'SFTP' — keep acronym.

settings.ssh.sftp.help.message: העברת קבצים בבטחה עם לקוחות מובנים של SFTP או SCP.
settings.ssh.sftp.help.description: Helper text about SFTP/SCP file transfer. Keep the acronyms.

settings.ssh.localForward.help.message: לאפשר לעמיתים שמתחברים לתעל פתחות מקומיות לשירותים שנגישים למארח הזה.
settings.ssh.localForward.help.description: Helper text for local port forwarding.

settings.ssh.remoteForward.help.message: לאפשר לעמיתים שמתחברים לחשוף בפני המארח הזה פתחות שחוזרות למכונות שלהם.
settings.ssh.remoteForward.help.description: Helper text for remote port forwarding.

settings.ssh.jwt.label.description: Toggle label: enable JWT authentication. 'JWT' — keep acronym.

settings.ssh.jwt.help.message: לאמת כל הפעלת SSH מול ספק הזהות (IdP) שלך לזהות המשתמש ולפיקוח. יש להשבית כדי לסמוך רק על מדיניויות ה־ACL (רשימת בקרת גישה) של הרשתות בלבד, שימושי כשאין ספק זהות (IdP) זמין.
settings.ssh.jwt.help.description: Helper text for JWT auth. 'IdP' (identity provider) and 'ACL' are acronyms — keep them.

settings.ssh.jwtTtl.label.description: Label for the JWT cache time-to-live field. 'JWT' and 'TTL' — keep acronyms.

settings.ssh.jwtTtl.help.message: כמה זמן הלקוח הזה שומר JWT במטמון בטרם הצגת בקשה חוזרת לחיבורי SSH יוצאים. יש להגדיר ל־0 כדי להשבית את המטמון ולעבור אימות עם כל חיבור מחדש.
settings.ssh.jwtTtl.help.description: Helper text for the JWT cache TTL; mentions setting 0 to disable caching.

settings.ssh.jwtTtl.suffix.description: Unit suffix shown after the JWT TTL number field. The '(s)' marks an optional plural.

settings.advanced.interfaceName.label.description: Field label for the WireGuard interface name.

settings.advanced.interfaceName.error.message: יש להשתמש ב־1-15 אותיות, ספרות, נקודות, מינוסים או קווים תחתיים.
settings.advanced.interfaceName.error.description: Validation message for the interface name (allowed characters).

settings.advanced.interfaceName.errorMac.message: חייב להתחיל ב־„utun” ולאחריו מספר (למשל: utun100).
settings.advanced.interfaceName.errorMac.description: Validation message specific to macOS, where the name must start with 'utun' followed by a number. Keep 'utun' and the example.

settings.advanced.port.error.description: Validation message for the port range. {min} and {max} are numbers; keep them.

settings.advanced.port.help.message: אם מוגדר ל־0, ייעשה שימוש בפתחה פנויה אקראית.
settings.advanced.port.help.description: Helper text: 0 means a random free port is used.

settings.advanced.mtu.error.message: נא למלא ערך MTU בין {min} לבין {max}.
settings.advanced.mtu.error.description: Validation message for the MTU range. {min} and {max} are numbers; keep them.

settings.advanced.psk.help.message: מפתח ששותף מראש (PSK) כרשות להצפנה סימטרית במיוחד. לא זהה למפתח התקנה של NetBird. תהיה לך תקשורת רק מול עמיתים שמשתמשים באותו המפתח ששותף מראש.
settings.advanced.psk.help.description: Helper text for the WireGuard PSK. 'WireGuard', 'PSK', and 'NetBird Setup Key' are product/technical terms — keep them.

settings.troubleshooting.anonymize.label.message: הסוואת מידע רגיש עם מידע אלמוני
settings.troubleshooting.anonymize.label.description: Toggle label: anonymize sensitive information in the bundle.

settings.troubleshooting.anonymize.help.message: הסתרת כתובות IP ציבוריות ושמות תחום שאינם של NetBird מהיומנים.
settings.troubleshooting.anonymize.help.description: Helper text for anonymizing logs (hides public IPs and non-NetBird domains).

settings.troubleshooting.systemInfo.labe.description: Toggle label: include system information in the bundle.

settings.troubleshooting.systemInfo.help.message: לכלול את מערכת ההפעלה, הליבה, ממשקי הרשת וטבלאות הניתוב.
settings.troubleshooting.systemInfo.help.description: Helper text listing the system info included (OS, kernel, interfaces, routing tables).

settings.troubleshooting.upload.label.message: להעלות את המאגד לשרתים של NetBird
settings.troubleshooting.upload.label.description: Toggle label: upload the bundle to NetBird servers.

settings.troubleshooting.upload.help.message: החזרת מפתח שליחה לשיתוף עם התמיכה של NetBird.
settings.troubleshooting.upload.help.description: Helper text for uploading the bundle.

settings.troubleshooting.trace.label.description: Toggle label: raise daemon log level to TRACE while the bundle is built. 'TRACE' is a log level.

settings.troubleshooting.trace.help.message: הגברת רמת התיעוד ביומן ל־TRACE (מעקב) ומשחזרת אותה לאחר מכן.
settings.troubleshooting.trace.help.description: Helper text for the trace toggle. 'TRACE' is a log level — keep as-is.

settings.troubleshooting.capture.label.description: Toggle label: open a capture session — reconnect NetBird, wait a duration, optionally record packets.

settings.troubleshooting.capture.help.message: חיבור מחדש והמתנה כדי לאפשר ליצור את התקלה מחדש.
settings.troubleshooting.capture.help.description: Helper text for the master Capture Session toggle.

settings.troubleshooting.packets.label.description: Toggle label: capture packets to a .pcap during the capture session.

settings.troubleshooting.packets.help.message: שמירת ‎.pcap של תעבורת רשת בזמן חלון האיסוף.
settings.troubleshooting.packets.help.description: Helper text for the packet recording toggle. '.pcap' is a file extension — keep it.

settings.troubleshooting.duration.label.description: Label for the trace-capture duration field.

settings.troubleshooting.duration.help.message: למשך כמה זמן הפעלת הלכידה רצה.
settings.troubleshooting.duration.help.description: Helper text for the capture duration.

settings.troubleshooting.duration.suffix.description: Unit suffix after the duration field. The '(s)' marks an optional plural.

settings.troubleshooting.create.description: Button to create the debug bundle. Keep short.

settings.troubleshooting.progress.descri.message: היומנים, פרטי המערכת ומצב החיבור נאספים. האיסוף בדרך כלל לוקח כמה רגעים. אפשר להמשיך להשתמש ב־NetBird או לסגור את ההגדרות בזמן שהתהליך מסתיים.
settings.troubleshooting.progress.descri.description: Status text shown while the debug bundle is being collected; reassures the user they can keep using NetBird or close Settings meanwhile.

settings.troubleshooting.cancelling.description: Status shown while cancelling bundle creation. Ends with an ellipsis.

settings.troubleshooting.done.uploadedTi.description: Success title after the bundle was uploaded.

settings.troubleshooting.done.savedTitle.description: Title shown when the bundle was saved locally (not uploaded).

settings.troubleshooting.done.uploadedDe.message: יש לשתף את מפתח השליחה להלן עם <docs>התמיכה של NetBird</docs>. עותק מקומי נשמר בנוסף על המכונה שלך.
settings.troubleshooting.done.uploadedDe.description: Body after upload, telling the user to share the upload key with support. '<docs>…</docs>' wraps the inline link to the NetBird support docs — keep the tags exactly and wrap the phrase that means 'NetBird support'.

settings.troubleshooting.done.savedDescr.message: מאגד ניפוי השגיאות שלך נשמר מקומית.
settings.troubleshooting.done.savedDescr.description: Body shown when the bundle was only saved locally.

settings.troubleshooting.done.copyKey.description: Button to copy the upload key. Keep short.

settings.troubleshooting.done.openFolder.description: Button to open the folder containing the bundle. Keep short.

settings.troubleshooting.done.openFileLo.description: Button to reveal the bundle file in the OS file manager.

settings.troubleshooting.uploadFailedWit.message: ההעלאה נכשלה: {reason} המאגד עדיין שמור מקומית.
settings.troubleshooting.uploadFailedWit.description: Shown when upload failed but the bundle was saved locally. {reason} is the server error text; keep it.

settings.troubleshooting.uploadFailed.message: ההעלאה נכשלה. המאגד עדיין שמור מקומית.
settings.troubleshooting.uploadFailed.description: Shown when upload failed (no specific reason) but the bundle was saved locally.

settings.troubleshooting.stage.reconnect.description: Progress stage: reconnecting NetBird. Ends with an ellipsis.

settings.troubleshooting.stage.capturing.description: Progress stage: capturing logs. {elapsed} and {total} are time values (e.g. 0:30 / 2:00); keep both.

settings.troubleshooting.stage.bundling.description: Progress stage: generating the debug bundle. Ends with an ellipsis.

settings.troubleshooting.stage.uploading.description: Progress stage: uploading to NetBird. Ends with an ellipsis.

settings.troubleshooting.stage.cancellin.description: Progress stage: cancelling. Ends with an ellipsis.

settings.about.client.description: About tab: client product name and version. {version} is a version number; keep it. 'NetBird Client' — keep brand.

settings.about.clientName.description: About tab: the client product name shown when no version is available. Brand — do not translate.

settings.about.development.description: Badge shown next to the version on development builds. Keep the square brackets.

settings.about.gui.description: About tab: UI component name and version. {version} is a version number; keep it. 'GUI' = the graphical app.

settings.about.guiName.description: About tab: the UI component name shown without a version. 'GUI' = the graphical app.

settings.about.copyright.description: Copyright line. {year} is the current year; keep it. 'NetBird' — brand.

settings.about.links.cla.description: Footer link: CLA (Contributor License Agreement). Acronym — keep as-is.

settings.about.community.github.description: Community link: GitHub. Brand — do not translate.

settings.about.community.slack.description: Community link: Slack. Brand — do not translate.

update.banner.message.description: Update banner text when a new version is ready to install. {version} is the version number; keep it.

update.banner.later.description: Banner button to postpone the update. Keep short.

update.banner.installNow.description: Banner button to install the update now. Keep short.

update.card.versionAvailableDownload.description: Update card text when a version is available to download. {version} is the version number; keep it.

update.card.versionAvailableInstall.description: Update card text when a version is available to install. {version} is the version number; keep it.

update.card.whatsNew.description: Link / label that opens the release notes.

update.card.installNow.description: Update card button: install now. Keep short.

update.card.getInstaller.description: Update card button: download the installer.

update.card.autoCheckInterval.message: NetBird בודק ברקע אם יש עדכונים.
update.card.autoCheckInterval.description: Note that NetBird checks for updates in the background.

update.card.onLatestVersion.description: Shown when the client is already up to date.

update.header.tooltip.description: Tooltip on the header update badge.

update.overlay.updatingVersion.description: Heading in the install-progress window while updating to a specific version. {version} is the version number; keep it. The 'v' prefix is part of the version display.

update.overlay.updating.description: Heading in the install-progress window while updating when the target version isn't known.

update.overlay.description.message: גרסה חדשה יותר זמינה ומותקנת כרגע. NetBird יופעל מחדש אוטומטית לאחר סיום העדכון.
update.overlay.description.description: Install-progress window body explaining NetBird will restart automatically after the update.

update.overlay.error.timeoutTitle.description: Install-progress window error title: the update took too long.

update.overlay.error.timeoutDescription.message: התקנת {target} ארכה זמן רב מדי ולא הסתיימה.
update.overlay.error.timeoutDescription.description: Install-progress window error body for a timeout. {target} is the target-version label (see update.overlay.error.targetVersion / targetFallback); keep it.

update.overlay.error.canceledTitle.description: Install-progress window error title: the update was stopped / canceled.

update.overlay.error.canceledDescription.message: העדכון לגרסה {target} בוטל לפני שהספיק להסתיים.
update.overlay.error.canceledDescription.description: Install-progress window error body for a canceled update. {target} is the target-version label; keep it.

update.overlay.error.failTitle.description: Install-progress window error title: the update couldn't be installed.

update.overlay.error.failDescription.description: Install-progress window error body for a failed install. {target} is the target-version label; keep it.

update.overlay.error.unknownMessage.description: Fallback text for an unspecified error, used inside other messages.

update.overlay.error.targetVersion.description: The target-version label substituted into {target}. {version} is a number; keep the 'v' prefix.

update.overlay.error.targetFallback.description: Fallback target label used when the version isn't known, substituted into {target}.

update.error.loadStateTitle.description: Error-dialog title when loading update state fails.

update.error.triggerTitle.description: Error-dialog title when starting the update fails.

update.page.versionLine.description: Install-progress window text naming the target version. {version} is the version number; keep it.

update.page.versionLineGeneric.description: Install-progress text used when the target version isn't known.

update.page.outdated.message: גרסת הלקוח שלך ישנה מגרסת העדכון האוטומטי שהוגדרה בניהול.
update.page.outdated.description: Note that the client is older than the auto-update version set in Management. 'Management' = the NetBird management server / console.

update.page.status.timeout.message: הזמן שהוקצב לעדכון הסתיים. נא לנסות שוב.
update.page.status.timeout.description: Install status: timed out; asks the user to retry.

update.page.status.failed.description: Install status: failed. {message} is the error detail; keep it.

update.page.status.unknownError.description: Fallback text for an unknown update error, used inside update.page.status.failed.

update.page.failedTitle.description: Heading shown when the install failed.

update.page.timeoutMessage.description: Message shown when the install timed out.

update.page.dontClose.message: נא לא לסגור את החלון הזה
update.page.dontClose.description: Warning asking the user not to close the install window.

update.page.updating.description: Short status: updating. Ends with an ellipsis.

window.title.settings.description: OS window-chrome title for the Settings window. The app prefixes it with 'NetBird - '.

window.title.signIn.description: OS window-chrome title for the sign-in window.

window.title.sessionExpiration.description: OS window-chrome title for the session-expiration window.

window.title.updating.description: OS window-chrome title for the update / install window.

window.title.welcome.description: OS window-chrome title for the first-launch welcome window. 'NetBird' — brand.

window.title.error.description: OS window-chrome title for the error window.

welcome.title.message: כדאי לחפש את NetBird בשורת המשימות שלך
welcome.title.description: Heading on the first onboarding step, pointing the user to the tray icon. 'tray' = system tray / menu bar.

welcome.description.message: NetBird שוכן בשורת המשימות שלך. יש ללחוץ על הסמל כדי להתחבר, להחליף פרופילים או כדי לפתוח את ההגדרות.
welcome.description.description: Body of the first onboarding step explaining the tray icon.

welcome.continue.description: Primary button to advance the onboarding. Keep short.

welcome.back.description: Button to go back a step in onboarding. Keep short.

welcome.management.title.description: Heading on the onboarding step for choosing a management server.

welcome.management.description.message: יש ללחוץ על המשך כדי להתחיל או לבחור באירוח עצמי אם יש לך שרת NetBird משלך.
welcome.management.description.description: Body of the management step; mentions choosing Self-hosted if the user runs their own server.

welcome.management.cloud.title.description: Option title: NetBird Cloud. Brand — do not translate 'NetBird Cloud'.

welcome.management.cloud.description.message: אפשר להשתמש בשירות באירוח שלנו. לא צריך הגדרות.
welcome.management.cloud.description.description: Option body for NetBird Cloud (hosted service, no setup required).

welcome.management.selfHosted.descriptio.description: Option body for connecting to your own management server.

welcome.management.urlLabel.description: Field label for the management-server URL.

welcome.management.urlPlaceholder.description: Example URL placeholder. Sample URL — do not translate it.

welcome.management.urlInvalid.message: נא למלא כתובת שרת ניהול תקפה, כגון, https://netbird.selfhosted.com:443
welcome.management.urlInvalid.description: Validation message for an invalid URL. The example URL stays as-is.

welcome.management.urlUnreachable.message: לא ניתן להגיע לשרת הזה. נא לבדוק את הכתובת או את הרשת שלך, לאחר מכן להמשיך אם היא נכונה בוודאות.
welcome.management.urlUnreachable.description: Soft warning when the server couldn't be reached during onboarding; the user may continue anyway.

welcome.management.checking.description: Status shown while checking the server URL. Ends with an ellipsis.

browserLogin.title.message: יש להשלים את הכניסה בדפדפן שלך
browserLogin.title.description: Heading telling the user to finish signing in via their browser.

browserLogin.notSeeing.message: פתחנו לשונית בדפדפן כדי שנוכל לסיים עם הכניסה למערכת. לא רואה אותה?
browserLogin.notSeeing.description: Prompt asking whether the user doesn't see the opened browser tab.

browserLogin.tryAgain.description: Button to re-open the browser sign-in page. Keep short.

browserLogin.openFailedTitle.description: Error-dialog title when the browser couldn't be opened.

sessionExpiration.title.description: Heading warning the session will expire soon.

sessionExpiration.titleLater.description: Alternate, less-urgent heading: the session will expire.

sessionExpiration.description.message: המכשיר הזה ינותק בהקדם. יש לחדש את הכניסה דרך הדפדפן.
sessionExpiration.description.description: Body warning the device will disconnect soon; renew via a browser sign-in.

sessionExpiration.descriptionLater.message: כניסה עם דפדפן משאירה את המכשיר הזה מחובר לרשת שלך.
sessionExpiration.descriptionLater.description: Body for the less-urgent variant; a browser sign-in keeps the device connected.

sessionExpiration.stay.description: Button to renew the session (keep connected). Keep short.

sessionExpiration.authenticate.description: Button to authenticate / sign in. Keep short.

sessionExpiration.logout.description: Button to log out. Keep short.

sessionExpiration.expired.description: Heading shown once the session has actually expired.

sessionExpiration.expiredDescription.message: המכשיר נותק. יש לעבור אימות עם כניסת דפדפן כדי להתחבר מחדש.
sessionExpiration.expiredDescription.description: Body shown after expiry; authenticate via a browser sign-in to reconnect.

sessionExpiration.close.description: Close button on the session window. Keep short.

sessionExpiration.extendFailedTitle.description: Error-dialog title when extending the session fails.

sessionExpiration.logoutFailedTitle.description: Error-dialog title when logging out fails.

peers.search.placeholder.description: Placeholder in the peers search field.

peers.filter.all.description: Peers filter option: All. Keep short.

peers.filter.online.description: Peers filter option: Online. Keep short.

peers.filter.offline.description: Peers filter option: Offline. Keep short.

peers.empty.title.description: Title of the empty state when no peers are available.

peers.empty.description.message: או שאין לך עמיתים זמינים או שאין לך גישה לאף אחד מהם.
peers.empty.description.description: Body of the no-peers empty state.

peers.details.netbirdIp.description: Peer detail label: NetBird IP address. 'NetBird' — brand; 'IP' — keep acronym.

peers.details.netbirdIpv6.description: Peer detail label: NetBird IPv6 address. Keep 'NetBird' and 'IPv6'.

peers.details.publicKey.description: Peer detail label: WireGuard public key.

peers.details.lastHandshake.description: Peer detail label: time of the last WireGuard handshake.

peers.details.statusSince.description: Peer detail label: time since the last connection-status update.

peers.details.localIce.description: Peer detail label: local ICE candidate. 'ICE' — keep acronym.

peers.details.remoteIce.description: Peer detail label: remote ICE candidate. 'ICE' — keep acronym.

peers.details.never.description: Value shown when an event has never happened (e.g. last handshake = Never).

peers.details.justNow.description: Relative-time value meaning a moment ago.

peers.details.refresh.description: Button to refresh peer details. Keep short.

peers.details.networks.description: Peer detail label for the peer's network resources. Labelled 'Resources' in the UI.

peers.details.relayed.description: Connection-type value: the connection is relayed (not direct). Technical term.

peers.details.rosenpass.description: Peer detail indicating Rosenpass (quantum-resistance) is enabled. 'Rosenpass' — product name, do not translate.

networks.search.placeholder.message: חיפוש לפי רשת או שם תחום
networks.search.placeholder.description: Placeholder in the resources search field.

networks.filter.overlapping.description: Resources filter: Overlapping (overlapping IP ranges). Keep short.

networks.empty.title.description: Title of the empty state when no resources are available.

networks.empty.description.message: אין שאין לך משאבי רשת זמינים או שאין לך גישה לאף אחד מהם.
networks.empty.description.description: Body of the no-resources empty state.

networks.selected.description: Label / badge: the resource is selected (enabled).

networks.unselected.description: Label / badge: the resource is not selected.

networks.ips.heading.description: Heading for the list of a resource's resolved IP addresses.

networks.bulk.selectionCount.description: Header showing how many resources are active. {selected} and {total} are numbers; keep both.

networks.bulk.enableAll.description: Button to enable all resources. Keep short.

networks.bulk.disableAll.description: Button to disable all resources. Keep short.

exitNodes.search.placeholder.description: Placeholder in the exit-nodes search field.

exitNodes.none.description: Option meaning no exit node. Keep short.

exitNodes.empty.title.description: Title of the empty state when no exit nodes are available.

exitNodes.empty.description.message: לא שותפו נקודות יציאה עם העמית הזה.
exitNodes.empty.description.description: Body of the no-exit-nodes empty state.

exitNodes.dropdown.noneTitle.description: Dropdown option title: None (no exit node).

exitNodes.dropdown.noneDescription.description: Dropdown option body for None: direct connection without an exit node.

daemon.unavailable.title.description: Title of the overlay shown when the NetBird background service isn't running.

daemon.unavailable.description.message: היישום יתחבר אוטומטי לאחר שהשירות יופעל.
daemon.unavailable.description.description: Body reassuring the user the app will reconnect once the service is running.

daemon.unavailable.docsLink.description: Documentation link on the daemon-unavailable overlay.

daemon.outdated.title.description: Title of the overlay shown when the NetBird background service is too old to drive this UI.

daemon.outdated.description.message: יש לעדכן את שירות NetBird כדי להשתמש ביישום הזה.
daemon.outdated.description.description: Body of the daemon-outdated overlay telling the user to upgrade the service.

error.jwt_clock_skew.message: הכניסה נכשלה: השעון של המכשיר הזה לא תואם במדויק את זה של השרת. נא לכוון את שעון המערכת שלך ולנסות שוב.
error.jwt_clock_skew.description: Sign-in error shown to the user: the device clock is out of sync with the server.

error.jwt_expired.message: תוקף אסימון הכניסה שלך פג. נא להיכנס שוב.
error.jwt_expired.description: Sign-in error: the sign-in token expired; sign in again.

error.jwt_signature_invalid.message: הכניסה נכשלה: חתימת האסימון שגויה. נא ליצור קשר עם הנהלת המערכת שלך.
error.jwt_signature_invalid.description: Sign-in error: the token signature is invalid; contact the administrator.

error.session_expired.message: תוקף ההפעלה שלך פג. נא להיכנס שוב.
error.session_expired.description: Error: the session expired; sign in again.

error.invalid_setup_key.description: Error: the setup key is missing or invalid. 'setup key' is a NetBird term.

error.permission_denied.message: בקשת הכניסה נדחתה על ידי השרת.
error.permission_denied.description: Error: the server rejected the sign-in.

error.daemon_unreachable.message: הסוכן של NetBird לא מגיב. נא לבדוק שהשירות פעיל.
error.daemon_unreachable.description: Error: the NetBird background service isn't responding. 'daemon' = the background service.

error.unknown.description: Generic fallback error message used when no specific error applies.
